work_unit: MM-L001: engine.rs unwrap_or defaults mask corrupted order side/type
situation: audit-2026-07-04-002 finding MM-L001 (priority 15). attempt_match L599-600 used unwrap_or(OrderSide::Buy)/unwrap_or(OrderType::Market); L641 repeated the same unwrap_or for side. When order.side or order.order_type is corrupted/unparseable, silent fallback runs risk revalidation and fee calculation with wrong params, potentially allowing fills that should be rejected.
action: Replace unwrap_or with match + early cancel: invalid side/type sets order.status=Cancelled, error_message explains the corruption, release_order_resources frees frozen cash/position, save_order persists, EngineEvent 'order_cancelled_by_engine' published, function returns Err(reason). Removed duplicate side binding at L641 (side already validated above). cargo check -p moni-engine passes.
outcome_evidence: commit fec2de2 on auto/opt-moni-engine-1782949388; pushed to origin; cargo check -p moni-engine clean; diff +36/-3 lines replacing 2 unwrap_or calls with explicit match+cancel paths and removing 1 redundant binding.
next_suggestion: 派生 fix MM-L002 (engine.rs L919-926 weighted_average_price f64 drift) — 下一个 pending finding，同文件可继续在 opt-moni-engine-1782949388 上堆叠。

audit_findings.finding: unwrap_or(OrderSide::Buy) masks corrupted order.side; risk revalidation runs with wrong side param
audit_findings.remediation: match + early cancel with error_message + EngineEvent notification (applied in this case)

audit_findings.finding: unwrap_or(OrderType::Market) masks corrupted order.order_type; same risk as above
audit_findings.remediation: match + early cancel with error_message + EventEvent notification (applied in this case)

audit_findings.finding: Duplicate side binding with unwrap_or after risk reval already used side; redundant + same silent-fallback risk
audit_findings.remediation: Remove duplicate binding; reuse validated side from above (applied in this case)
